topic: How to list a product on Facebook Marketplace

inputs.topic: How to list a product on Facebook Marketplace

lesson.teacherTitle: List a Product on Facebook Marketplace
lesson.teacherObjective: After this lesson, you will be able to create a live listing on Facebook Marketplace using your Android phone.
lesson.teacherExplanation:
Today, we will learn how to use Facebook Marketplace to sell items. Facebook Marketplace is a tool that lets people buy and sell items locally without opening a separate store.

In KwaZulu-Natal, businesses like Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, use Facebook Marketplace to reach more customers. They list services like printing so that even people far from their shop can see what they offer.

You will create your own listing today by taking photos and writing a description. This is a real skill you can use to earn money by selling things you no longer need.
teacherDiscussionQuestions: What is one item you could sell from home?
How would you describe this item to make it interesting to others?
Why might Facebook Marketplace be a useful tool for people in our community?
lesson.teacherLocalExample: Inkify uses Facebook Marketplace to offer printing services in KwaZulu-Natal. By listing their services online, they reach customers who might not walk past their physical store.
teacherTimeGuide: 5 min: write board points, students copy
10 min: students do task on phones
5 min: recap — what is one thing you learned?
lesson.taskTitle: List a Product on Facebook Marketplace
lesson.taskIntro: You will have a live listing on Facebook Marketplace by the end of this task.
lesson.taskReflection: Describe a time in the future when you might use Facebook Marketplace to sell another item. What would that item be and why would you sell it?

lesson.teacherPlanHTML:
Learning Objective

List a Product on Facebook Marketplace

After this lesson, you will be able to create a live listing on Facebook Marketplace using your Android phone.

✏ Write on the Board
Write these before class starts — students copy them down
  • Install Facebook app
  • Log in or create account
  • Access Marketplace
  • List an item
  • Publish your listing

2Explain to Students

Read this aloud — then explain in your own words

Today, we will learn how to use Facebook Marketplace to sell items. Facebook Marketplace is a tool that lets people buy and sell items locally without opening a separate store.

In KwaZulu-Natal, businesses like Inkify, run by Samke Jaca and Ntokozo Gwacela, use Facebook Marketplace to reach more customers. They list services like printing so that even people far from their shop can see what they offer.

You will create your own listing today by taking photos and writing a description. This is a real skill you can use to earn money by selling things you no longer need.

3Discussion Questions

  1. 1What is one item you could sell from home?
  2. 2How would you describe this item to make it interesting to others?
  3. 3Why might Facebook Marketplace be a useful tool for people in our community?

4Local Example

Inkify uses Facebook Marketplace to offer printing services in KwaZulu-Natal. By listing their services online, they reach customers who might not walk past their physical store.
Time Guide — 30 minutes
5 minwrite board points, students copy
15 minteacher explains
10 minclass discussion
10 minstudents do task on phones
5 minrecap — what is one thing you learned?
